mapper.select: SELECT * FROM camera_config ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.update: INSERT INTO camera_config ( camera_code, camera_name, rtsp_url, location, enabled ) VALUES ( #{cameraCode}, #{cameraName}, #{rtspUrl}, #{location}, #{enabled} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE camera_name = VALUES(camera_name), rtsp_url = VALUES(rtsp_url), location = VALUES(location), enabled = VALUES(enabled), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
UPDATE camera_config SET camera_name = #{cameraName}, rtsp_url = #{rtspUrl}, location = #{location}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
